call ended.description: The call has ended, and the phone returns to idle state.

call ongoing.description: A call is currently in progress, either outgoing or incoming.

dialing out.description: The phone is in the process of dialing a number to establish an outgoing call.

hunging up.description: The call is in the process of being terminated, transitioning to call ended.

idle.description: The phone is in a resting state, waiting for an action like dialing or receiving a call.

incoming calls.description: The phone is ringing due to an incoming call, waiting for the user to answer or decline.
